title: diversified_address index-0 test oracle is code under test
description: diversified_address_index_zero_matches_manual_assembly assembles the 'expected' result by calling sapling.find_address(found_di) and orchard.address_at_index(found_di) — the same functions diversified_address calls internally. A systematic bug that affects both paths equally (e.g. wrong Scope, wrong DI pairing) would cause both sides to produce the same wrong UA and the test would pass. The test validates internal consistency, not correctness against an external reference. The correct oracle is a ZIP-316 test vector at a specific known diversifier index from zcash-hackworks — call diversified_address at a fixed DI and compare the resulting bech32m string to a pre-computed value.
